title: TradingCards
body:
## Features:
- Customizable card drops
- Drop chance system
- CustomModelData support
- BoosterPacks
- Deck System
- Rarities
- MythicMobs, MobArena & Towny Support
- MySQL & YAML Support
- PlaceholderAPI Support
- Vault & TreasuryAPI Support
- Per world/player allow / deny list
- Customize most messages​

## Pre-made configs:
You can use this as is or modify and create your own.
- 134 Cards
- 5 Rarities
- 7 Series
- 5 Upgrades
- 4 Booster Packs
- 5 Default Types + 1 Custom Type


### Dev Builds:
https://ci.codemc.io/job/sarhatabaot/job/TradingCards/

## Migration
Coming from version 5.0.4? [Find out how to migrate here](https://tradingcards.sarhatabaot.net/migration/5.0.4-greater-than-5.7.2+)

## Hooks
We support Towny, MythicMobs & MobArena. Just check the config files!

## Custom ResourcePack
We don't currently have our own. However you can use the community made one from https://github.com/isaaclepes/TradingCardsResource. **REQUIRES OPTIFINE​**
